_comment: Test-stub MCP server config used by scripts/test-v2-host.ts boot script. The boot script reads this file, substitutes the __WORKTREE_ROOT__ placeholder with process.cwd(), and writes the result to data/mcp-servers.json for the test run (backing up any pre-existing data/mcp-servers.json first). Keeping the fixture in scripts/ (not data/) makes the test/install boundary explicit.
